data.title: BTC price drops to $58K with new death cross signal. Analysis suggests return to sub-$60,000 levels as breakout fails.
data.description: According to analysis, Bitcoin fell short of breaking out of its macro trading range and is now facing new price targets with a potential drop to below $60,000.

data.title: Scania's L-series cab gets 5-star safety rating in Euro NCAP's Safer Trucks program. Highest rating achieved, electric version tested.
data.description: In SÖDERTÄLJE, Sweden, on January 20, 2026, Scania announced that their L-series cab has been awarded a five-star safety rating in the Euro NCAP's Safer Trucks program. This rating, the highest possible, was given to the electric version of the L-cab following rigorous testing by the European consumer testing organization. This recognition highlights the exceptional safety standards upheld by Scania in their vehicles.

data.title: Trade leaders optimistic for 2026 growth despite challenges: 94% foresee growth matching/exceeding 2025 levels.
data.description: In the Global Trade Observatory Annual Outlook, it was reported that 94% of respondents anticipate that the growth in 2026 will either equal or surpass the growth experienced in 2025. This optimism is notable despite challenges such as tariffs, rising costs, and policy uncertainties. The findings were revealed in Davos, Switzerland on January 20, 2026. The report highlights the fragility of the global trade landscape, yet it emphasizes that business confidence remains high, indicating resilience in the face of these obstacles.

data.title: Analysts predict U.S. Bancorp Q4 earnings to be $1.19/share, up from $1.07/share last year. Revenue forecasted at $7.32 billion, up from $6.98 billion last year. U.S. Bancorp recently agreed to acquire BTIG, LLC.
data.description: U.S. Bancorp (NYSE: USB) is set to announce its fourth-quarter earnings on Tuesday, Jan. 20, before the market opens. Analysts are anticipating the Minneapolis-based company to post earnings of $1.19 per share, a rise from $1.07 per share in the same period last year. The consensus among analysts predicts quarterly revenue for U.S. Bancorp to be around $7.32 billion, compared to $6.98 billion reported the previous year. Recently, on Jan. 13, U.S. Bancorp made a significant move by acquiring BTIG, LLC. Ending at $54.40 on Friday, U.S. Bancorp's shares saw a 0.8% increase. For those interested, the latest analyst ratings for U.S. Bancorp can be accessed through the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga. Remember, more details are available on Benzinga.com's complete article.

data.title: InterDigital (Nasdaq: IDCC) signs new license deal with LG Electronics for patents in mobile, video, and AI tech.
data.description: InterDigital, Inc., a technology research and development company specializing in mobile, video, and AI technologies, based in Wilmington, Delaware, disclosed on January 20, 2026, that it has entered into a fresh patent license deal with LG Electronics. The agreement, concerning Nasdaq-listed InterDigital, Inc. under the ticker IDCC, marks a significant development in the partnership between the two entities.

data.title: Haims Capital to introduce RKM 6.0 for US market, an intelligent investment system in June 2026.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, Haims Capital, a financial technology company known for its data-driven investment analytics, revealed its intention to unveil RKM 6.0 in June 2026. This updated version of their Real-time Kernel Matrix (RKM) intelligent investment decision system is highly anticipated in the financial sector.
